## Question

Ask your question here. Be as specific as possible.

## Context

What are you trying to accomplish? Provide context about:
- Your workflow
- Your repository setup
- What you've tried so far

## Environment (if relevant)

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **GIP Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Related Documentation

Have you checked these resources?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Existing issues
- [ ] Code examples

## Additional Information

Any other information that might help answer your question.
